definitions.text: ISO 639-3 language code for Papantla Totonac.
The highest or uppermost part of something.
examples: His kite got caught at the top of the tree.
We flipped the machine onto its top.

definitions.text: The part of something that is usually highest or uppermost.
examples: We flipped the machine onto its top.

definitions.text: The uppermost part of a page, picture, viewing screen, etc.
examples: Further weather information can be found at the top of your television screen.
Headings appear at the tops of pages.

definitions.text: To cover on the top or with a top.
examples: I like my ice cream topped with chocolate sauce.

definitions.text: Situated on the top of something.
Best; of the highest quality, fame or rank.
examples: She's in the top dance school.

definitions.text: Very good, of high quality, power, or rank.

examples: Our product is top-rated on all major platforms.
This is the top-performing school in the area.

definitions.text: The signal among tailors and seamstresses for snuffing the candle. The last of them to cry "top" had to snuff the candle.
